chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 971 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 18-08-2022 Petitioner Khuda Bux Sahito, present in person. Mr. Noor Hassan Malik, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The petitioner served as Head Master in Government High School, Soomar Channa, District Naushahro Feroze, and retired from his service on 01-04-2022 on attaining the age of superannuation i.e. 60 years vide letter dated 17-03-2022. His grievance is that he though received General Provident Fund and is receiving monthly pension, yet not received Encashment of Leave Preparatory to Retirement (‘LPR’) and Commutation. Azhar Hussain Jagirani, Sub-Accountant duly authorized by District Accounts Officer, Naushahro Feroze, is present in Court and states that the case of the petitioner for payment of Encashment of LPR and Commutation is ripe up, however, as the funds have not been received from Finance Department, Government of Sindh, the same could not be paid to him. We, therefore, dispose of this petition by directing respondents No.2 and 3 (Finance Department, Government of Sindh, Karachi and District Accounts Officer, District Naushahro Feroze) to pay the remaining service benefits of the petitioner, as above, within six weeks hereof, and such compliance report be submitted to this Court through Additional Registrar. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms. Office is directed to supply the copy of this order to learned Additional A.G. Sindh for compliance. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
